name: Catch the Skunk
short_description: Will you be the hero who gets rid of that heavy smell? Catch those skunks in this stinky SmartGames adventure!
detailed_description:
It’s a stinky situation in Catch the Skunk! The skunks are causing a ruckus, and it’s up to you to save the other creatures from their smell. Use your wits to drag the puzzle pieces onto the board, covering all the skunks with crates while ensuring no pieces overlap. But watch out—don’t accidentally cover any of the other critters!

 

Catch the Skunk is a puzzle game from SmartGames, comes with 60 challenges across 5 smelly worlds and will definitely test your capture skills! 

 

Will you become the World’s Smartest Gamer?

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch
